scene.speaker: Aric
scene.line: Now we tell the truth. Then we stop him.

scene.speaker: Sera
scene.line: Then we stand together until the truth is heard.

scene.speaker: Zephyr
scene.line: And if the world wants dramatic weather for that speech, I can arrange it.

dialogue.end_card: TO BE CONTINUED IN CHAPTER 2 - THE SHATTERED MARCH
